text: Fix parent phase selection with reusable phase search modal.
description: When changing the parent phase of an aim, the list of available phases is mostly empty or just one entry. Fix that. And while we're at it, let's implement a phase search modal analogous to the aim search modal that can be used at dfferent places such as the parent phase selection within phase edit modal

status.comment: Refactored PhaseCreationModal to use new PhaseSearchModal. Implemented focus restoration and unified styles. Refactored AimSearchModal to use events.
